1.output_text:
DUNGEON
Story v0.9.95-beta (built 2026-03-27)
Sharpee v0.9.95-beta
A port of Mainframe Zork (1981)
By Tim Anderson, Marc Blank, Bruce Daniels, and Dave Lebling
Ported by David Cornelson
Type HELP for instructions, ABOUT for credits.
West of House
This is an open field west of a white house with a boarded front door.
You can see small mailbox, front door, welcome mat, white house here.

North of House
You are facing the north side of a white house. There is no door here, and all the windows are barred.
You can see white house here.

Behind House
You are behind the white house. In one corner of the house there is a small window which is slightly ajar.
You can see window, white house here.
You open window.

Kitchen
This is the kitchen of the white house. A table seems to have been used recently for the preparation of food. A passage leads to the west, and a dark staircase can be seen leading upward. To the east is a small window which is open.
You can see kitchen table, elongated brown sack, glass bottle here.

Living Room
This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.
You can see trophy case, elvish sword, brass lantern, large oriental rug, wooden door here.
Taken.
Taken.
The brass lantern switches on, banishing the darkness.

Kitchen
This is the kitchen of the white house. A table seems to have been used recently for the preparation of food. A passage leads to the west, and a dark staircase can be seen leading upward. To the east is a small window which is open.
You can see kitchen table, elongated brown sack, glass bottle here.

Attic
This is the attic. The only exit is stairs that lead down.
You can see table, large coil of rope, nasty knife, brick, shiny wire here.
Taken.

Kitchen
This is the kitchen of the white house. A table seems to have been used recently for the preparation of food. A passage leads to the west, and a dark staircase can be seen leading upward. To the east is a small window which is open.
You can see kitchen table, elongated brown sack, glass bottle here.

Living Room
This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.
You can see trophy case, large oriental rug, wooden door here.

You give large oriental rug a push, but it doesn't move far.
Moving the rug reveals a trap door.
You open trap door.

Cellar
This is a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading east, and a crawlway to the south. To the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.
You can see steep metal ramp here.
The door crashes shut, and you hear someone barring it.
Your sword is glowing with a faint blue glow.

Troll Room
This is a small room with passages off in all directions. Bloodstains and deep scratches (perhaps made by an axe) mar the walls.
You can see nasty-looking troll here.
The axe sweeps past as you jump aside.
Your sword has begun to glow very brightly.

A good stroke, but it's too slow; the troll dodges.
The troll hits you with a glancing blow, and you are momentarily stunned.
Your sword has begun to glow very brightly.

You are still recovering from a staggering blow.
The axe sweeps past as you jump aside.

The troll takes a final blow and slumps to the floor dead.
Almost as soon as the troll breathes his last, a cloud of sinister black smoke envelops him, and when the fog lifts, the carcass has disappeared.
With the troll dispatched, the passage to the north is now clear.
Your sword is no longer glowing.

East-West Passage
This is a narrow east-west passageway. There is a narrow stairway leading down at the north end of the room.

Deep Ravine
You are in a deep ravine at a point where a crack opens to the east. A passage leads south, and a steep trail leads down.

Rocky Crawl
This is a crawlway with a low ceiling. A passage goes to the east, and a narrow opening leads west.

Dome Room
This is the periphery of a large dome, which forms the ceiling of another room below. Protecting you from a precipitous drop is a wooden railing which circles the dome.
You can see railing here.
The rope is now securely fastened to the railing, dangling down into the darkness below.

Torch Room
This is a large room with a prominent doorway leading to a down staircase. To the west is a narrow twisting tunnel, covered with a thin layer of dust. Above you is a large dome painted with scenes depicting elfin hacking rites. Up around the edge of the dome (20 feet up) is a wooden railing. In the center of the room there is a white marble pedestal.
You can see ivory torch here.
Taken.
ivory torch isn't something you can switch on.
You switch off brass lantern, plunging the area into darkness.

Torch Room
This is a large room with a prominent doorway leading to a down staircase. To the west is a narrow twisting tunnel, covered with a thin layer of dust. Above you is a large dome painted with scenes depicting elfin hacking rites. Up around the edge of the dome (20 feet up) is a wooden railing. In the center of the room there is a white marble pedestal.

North/South Crawlway
This is a north-south crawlway; a passage also goes to the east. There is a hole above, but it provides no opportunities for climbing.

Studio
This is what appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the north and northwest of the room are open doors (also covered with paint). An extremely dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace; although you might be able to get up it, it seems unlikely you could get back down.
You can see chimney, paint here.

Gallery
This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.
You can see painting here.

2.output_text:
Bank Entrance
You are in the grand entrance hall of the Bank of Zork. Marble columns rise to a vaulted ceiling decorated with gold leaf. A brass plaque on the wall reads "BANK OF ZORK - Securing Your Treasures Since 668 GUE". The main lobby lies to the south.
You can see brass plaque here.

East Teller
You are behind the eastern teller window. This area is much like the western side, with a dusty counter and abandoned paperwork. A passage leads west, and a door to the south leads to the back offices.

Chairman's Office
You are in the opulent office of the Bank's former chairman. A massive mahogany desk dominates the room, and the walls are lined with bookshelves containing leather-bound volumes. A painting hangs on the north wall. Doors lead north and east.
You can see portrait, mahogany desk here.

East Teller
You are behind the eastern teller window. This area is much like the western side, with a dusty counter and abandoned paperwork. A passage leads west, and a door to the south leads to the back offices.

West Teller's Room
This is a small square room, which was used by a bank officer whose job it was to retrieve safety deposit boxes for the customer. On the north side of the room is a sign which reads "Viewing Room". On the west side of the room, above an open door, is a sign reading
            BANK PERSONNEL ONLY

Safety Depository
This is a large rectangular room. The east and west walls here were used for storing safety deposit boxes. As might be expected, all have been carefully removed by evil persons. To the east, west, and south of the room are large doorways. The northern "wall" of the room is a shimmering curtain of light. In the center of the room is a large stone cube, about 10 feet on a side. Engraved on the side of the cube is some lettering.
You can see stone cube, shimmering curtain, vault door, north wall here.

Small Room
This is a small bare room with no distinguishing features. There are no exits from this room.
You feel somewhat disoriented as you pass through...

In the center of the room is a large stone cube, about 10 feet on a side. Engraved on the side of the cube is some lettering.
You feel somewhat disoriented as you pass through...

Vault
This is the Vault of the Bank of Zork, in which there are no doors.
You feel somewhat disoriented as you pass through...

In the center of the room is a large stone cube, about 10 feet on a side. Engraved on the side of the cube is some lettering.
You feel somewhat disoriented as you pass through...

Viewing Room
This is a room used by holders of safety deposit boxes to view their contents. On the north side of the room is a sign which says
REMAIN HERE WHILE THE BANK OFFICER RETRIEVES YOUR DEPOSIT BOX
WHEN YOU ARE FINISHED, LEAVE THE BOX, AND EXIT TO THE SOUTH
AN ADVANCED PROTECTIVE DEVICE PREVENTS ALL CUSTOMERS FROM
REMOVING ANY SAFETY DEPOSIT BOX FROM THIS VIEWING AREA!
Thank you for banking at the Zork!
You feel somewhat disoriented as you pass through...

"Is the phrase 'hello sailor' useful anywhere in the game?"

"What is the minimum total value of the zorkmid treasures in the game?"

data.roomDescription: This is a small room with passages off in all directions. Bloodstains and deep scratches (perhaps made by an axe) mar the walls.

contents.name: nasty-looking troll
contents.description: A nasty-looking troll stands here, wielding a bloody axe. He blocks the northern passage.

data.text: The axe sweeps past as you jump aside.
A good stroke, but it's too slow; the troll dodges.
The troll hits you with a glancing blow, and you are momentarily stunned.
You are still recovering from a staggering blow.
The axe sweeps past as you jump aside.
The troll takes a final blow and slumps to the floor dead.
Almost as soon as the troll breathes his last, a cloud of sinister black smoke envelops him, and when the fog lifts, the carcass has disappeared.
With the troll dispatched, the passage to the north is now clear.

sourceRoom.name: Gallery
sourceRoom.description: This is an art gallery. Most of the paintings have been stolen by vandals with exceptional taste. The vandals left through either the north or west exits.

destinationRoom.name: Studio
destinationRoom.description: This is what appears to have been an artist's studio. The walls and floors are splattered with paints of 69 different colors. Strangely enough, nothing of value is hanging here. At the north and northwest of the room are open doors (also covered with paint). An extremely dark and narrow chimney leads up from a fireplace; although you might be able to get up it, it seems unlikely you could get back down.

destinationRoom.name: Chairman's Office
destinationRoom.description: You are in the opulent office of the Bank's former chairman. A massive mahogany desk dominates the room, and the walls are lined with bookshelves containing leather-bound volumes. A painting hangs on the north wall. Doors lead north and east.

room.name: Chairman's Office
room.description: You are in the opulent office of the Bank's former chairman. A massive mahogany desk dominates the room, and the walls are lined with bookshelves containing leather-bound volumes. A painting hangs on the north wall. Doors lead north and east.

visibleItems.name: portrait
visibleItems.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

visibleItems.name: mahogany desk
visibleItems.description: A massive mahogany desk that must weigh several hundred pounds. Its surface is covered with a layer of dust.

sourceRoom.name: Bank Lobby
sourceRoom.description: You are in the main lobby of the Bank of Zork. Teller windows line the east and west walls, though they have long been abandoned. Dust covers the once-polished marble floor. A velvet rope blocks access to the south, where a sign reads "Employees Only". The entrance is to the north.

destinationRoom.name: West Teller's Room
destinationRoom.description:
This is a small square room, which was used by a bank officer whose job it was to retrieve safety deposit boxes for the customer. On the north side of the room is a sign which reads "Viewing Room". On the west side of the room, above an open door, is a sign reading

            BANK PERSONNEL ONLY

destinationRoom.name: Safety Depository
destinationRoom.description: This is a large rectangular room. The east and west walls here were used for storing safety deposit boxes. As might be expected, all have been carefully removed by evil persons. To the east, west, and south of the room are large doorways. The northern "wall" of the room is a shimmering curtain of light. In the center of the room is a large stone cube, about 10 feet on a side. Engraved on the side of the cube is some lettering.

visibleItems.name: shimmering curtain
visibleItems.description: The northern "wall" of the room is a shimmering curtain of light. It seems almost tangible, yet ethereal at the same time.

visibleItems.name: vault door
visibleItems.description: A massive circular vault door made of reinforced steel. It stands slightly ajar, its intricate locking mechanism long since broken.

visibleItems.name: north wall
visibleItems.description: The north wall looks solid but somehow insubstantial.

data.roomDescription:
This is a room used by holders of safety deposit boxes to view their contents. On the north side of the room is a sign which says

REMAIN HERE WHILE THE BANK OFFICER RETRIEVES YOUR DEPOSIT BOX
WHEN YOU ARE FINISHED, LEAVE THE BOX, AND EXIT TO THE SOUTH
AN ADVANCED PROTECTIVE DEVICE PREVENTS ALL CUSTOMERS FROM
REMOVING ANY SAFETY DEPOSIT BOX FROM THIS VIEWING AREA!
Thank you for banking at the Zork!

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: screwdriver
visibleItems.description: This is a large flathead screwdriver.

visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.description: This is a large flathead screwdriver.

params.text:
The book is written in a strange language, but one passage stands out:

"To banish the spirits of the dead, one must perform the Ritual of Exorcism:
Ring the bell, read the book aloud, light the candles with a flame.
Only then shall the gates of Hades be opened to the living."

data.text:

"To banish the spirits of the dead, one must perform the Ritual of Exorcism:
Ring the bell, read the book aloud, light the candles with a flame.
Only then shall the gates of Hades be opened to the living."

destinationRoom.name: Living Room
destinationRoom.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

room.name: Living Room
room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

The river canyon opens here, and sunlight shines in from above. A rainbow crosses over the falls to the west, and a narrow path continues to the southeast.

destinationRoom.name: Canyon Bottom
destinationRoom.description: You are beneath the walls of the river canyon which may be climbed here. The canyon runs north-south along the river. You can see the massive walls of the White Cliffs rising to the east.

room.name: Canyon Bottom
room.description: You are beneath the walls of the river canyon which may be climbed here. The canyon runs north-south along the river. You can see the massive walls of the White Cliffs rising to the east.

destinationRoom.name: Rocky Ledge
destinationRoom.description: You are on a ledge about halfway up the wall of the river canyon. You can see from here that the path continues from the bottom of the canyon up to the cliff above. There is a small path going down.

destinationRoom.name: Canyon View
destinationRoom.description: You are at the top of the Great Canyon, on its west wall. From here there is a marvelous view of the canyon and parts of the Frigid River upstream. Across the canyon, the walls of the White Cliffs join the mighty ramparts of the Flathead Mountains to the east. Following the Canyon, you can see a small path at the bottom of the canyon. There is a path here which goes west into the forest.

attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: screwdriver
visibleItems.description: This is a large flathead screwdriver.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass lantern
visibleItems.description: A battery-powered brass lantern.

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles
visibleItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: skeleton key
contents.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

contents.name: incense
contents.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

contents.name: large brochure
contents.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

visibleItems.name: pot of gold

visibleItems.name: large emerald
visibleItems.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

visibleItems.name: beautiful statue
visibleItems.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

destinationRoom.name: Riddle Room
destinationRoom.description:
This is a room which is bare on all sides. There is an exit down. To the east is a great door made of stone. Above the stone, the following words are written: 'No man shall enter this room without solving this riddle:

What is tall as a house,
round as a cup,
and all the king's horses can't draw it up?'

(Reply via 'ANSWER "answer"')

(Reply via 'ANSWER "answer"')

visibleItems.name: riddle inscription
visibleItems.description: The inscription reads: "What has roots as nobody sees, is taller than trees, up, up it goes, and yet never grows?"

room.name: Living Room
room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: glass bottle
visibleItems.description: A clear glass bottle containing water.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

visibleItems.name: brass lantern
visibleItems.description: A battery-powered brass lantern.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug

visibleItems.name: jewel-encrusted egg

contents.name: golden clockwork canary

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: screwdriver
visibleItems.description: This is a large flathead screwdriver.

visibleItems.name: trunk

destinationRoom.name: Living Room
destinationRoom.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices

sourceRoom.name: Cellar
sourceRoom.description: This is a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading east, and a crawlway to the south. To the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.

destinationRoom.name: Living Room
destinationRoom.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

room.name: Living Room
room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles
visibleItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

visibleItems.name: sharp stick
visibleItems.description: A sharp stick, which appears to have been broken at one end, is here.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg

contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles

destinationRoom.name: Torch Room
destinationRoom.description: This is a large room with a prominent doorway leading to a down staircase. To the west is a narrow twisting tunnel, covered with a thin layer of dust. Above you is a large dome painted with scenes depicting elfin hacking rites. Up around the edge of the dome (20 feet up) is a wooden railing. In the center of the room there is a white marble pedestal.

destinationRoom.description: This is a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading east, and a crawlway to the south. To the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.

room.name: Cellar
room.description: This is a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading east, and a crawlway to the south. To the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.

actor.name: yourself
actor.description: A brave adventurer, ready to explore the Great Underground Empire.

contents.name: glass bottle
contents.description: A clear glass bottle containing water.

contents.name: blue cake
contents.description: A cake with blue icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

contents.name: eat-me cake
contents.description: A cake with "Eat Me" written on it in icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

contents.name: brass lantern
contents.description: A battery-powered brass lantern.

contents.name: ivory torch
contents.description: A beautiful torch of polished ivory, its flame burning brightly.

contents.name: elongated brown sack
contents.description: A brown sack smelling of hot peppers.

contents.name: blue crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: jade figurine
contents.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

contents.name: red crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

sourceRoom.name: Cellar
sourceRoom.description: This is a dark and damp cellar with a narrow passageway leading east, and a crawlway to the south. To the west is the bottom of a steep metal ramp which is unclimbable.

room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

contents.name: violin
contents.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: grail
contents.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

contents.name: crystal trident
contents.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

contents.name: leather bag of coins
contents.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles
visibleItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

visibleItems.name: sharp stick
visibleItems.description: A sharp stick, which appears to have been broken at one end, is here.

room.name: Living Room
room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

contents.name: violin
contents.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: grail
contents.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

contents.name: crystal trident
contents.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

contents.name: leather bag of coins
contents.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

contents.name: blue crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: jade figurine
contents.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

contents.name: red crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles
visibleItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

visibleItems.name: sharp stick
visibleItems.description: A sharp stick, which appears to have been broken at one end, is here.

visibleItems.name: blue cake
visibleItems.description: A cake with blue icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

visibleItems.name: eat-me cake
visibleItems.description: A cake with "Eat Me" written on it in icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

visibleItems.name: elongated brown sack
visibleItems.description: A brown sack smelling of hot peppers.

contents.name: lunch
contents.description: A hearty lunch.

contents.name: clove of garlic
contents.description: A clove of garlic. Its strong smell might ward off something...

data.text: The thief receives a deep gash in his side.
A good slash, but it misses the thief by a mile.
A good stroke, but it's too slow; the thief dodges.
You dodge as the thief comes in low.
The thief takes a final blow and slumps to the floor dead.
The thief's ill-gotten gains scatter across the floor.
Almost as soon as the thief breathes his last breath, a cloud of sinister black fog envelops him, and when the fog lifts, the carcass has disappeared.

actor.name: yourself
actor.description: A brave adventurer, ready to explore the Great Underground Empire.

contents.name: glass bottle
contents.description: A clear glass bottle containing water.

contents.name: brass lantern
contents.description: A battery-powered brass lantern.

contents.name: golden clockwork canary
contents.description: A beautiful golden clockwork canary. It sings when wound.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

contents.name: silver chalice
contents.description: A beautiful silver chalice, tarnished with age but still valuable. It bears an inscription in an ancient language.

contents.name: ivory torch
contents.description: A beautiful torch of polished ivory, its flame burning brightly.

contents.name: frame piece
contents.description: A piece of the broken frame bearing a carved inscription: "Only devotion can reveal my location."

sourceRoom.name: Cyclops Room
sourceRoom.description: This room has an exit on the northwest, and a staircase leading up.

destinationRoom.name: Strange Passage
destinationRoom.description: This is a long passage. To the south is one entrance. On the east there is an old wooden door, with a large hole in it (about cyclops sized).

room.name: Strange Passage
room.description: This is a long passage. To the south is one entrance. On the east there is an old wooden door, with a large hole in it (about cyclops sized).

sourceRoom.name: Strange Passage
sourceRoom.description: This is a long passage. To the south is one entrance. On the east there is an old wooden door, with a large hole in it (about cyclops sized).

destinationRoom.name: Living Room
destinationRoom.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

room.name: Living Room
room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

contents.name: violin
contents.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: grail
contents.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

contents.name: crystal trident
contents.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

contents.name: leather bag of coins
contents.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

contents.name: blue crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: jade figurine
contents.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

contents.name: red crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles
visibleItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

visibleItems.name: sharp stick
visibleItems.description: A sharp stick, which appears to have been broken at one end, is here.

visibleItems.name: blue cake
visibleItems.description: A cake with blue icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

visibleItems.name: eat-me cake
visibleItems.description: A cake with "Eat Me" written on it in icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

visibleItems.name: elongated brown sack
visibleItems.description: A brown sack smelling of hot peppers.

contents.name: lunch
contents.description: A hearty lunch.

contents.name: clove of garlic
contents.description: A clove of garlic. Its strong smell might ward off something...

visibleItems.name: brick
visibleItems.description: A square brick of calciumite with some fuse wire wrapped around it.

visibleItems.name: shiny wire
visibleItems.description: A thin piece of shiny wire, suitable as a fuse or for various mechanical uses.

room.name: Forest Path
room.description: This is a path winding through a dimly lit forest. The path heads north-south here. One particularly large tree with some low branches stands at the side of the path.

room.name: Living Room
room.description: This is the living room. There is a door to the east. To the west is a wooden door with strange gothic lettering, which appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: elongated brown sack
visibleItems.description: A brown sack smelling of hot peppers.

contents.name: lunch
contents.description: A hearty lunch.

contents.name: clove of garlic
contents.description: A clove of garlic. Its strong smell might ward off something...

visibleItems.name: lunch
visibleItems.description: A hearty lunch.

visibleItems.name: clove of garlic
visibleItems.description: A clove of garlic. Its strong smell might ward off something...

visibleItems.name: glass bottle
visibleItems.description: A clear glass bottle containing water.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

contents.name: violin
contents.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: grail
contents.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

contents.name: crystal trident
contents.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

contents.name: leather bag of coins
contents.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

contents.name: blue crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: jade figurine
contents.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

contents.name: red crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: golden clockwork canary
contents.description: A beautiful golden clockwork canary. It sings when wound.

contents.name: brass bauble
contents.description: A shiny brass bauble, dropped by an unseen songbird in response to the canary's tune.

contents.name: silver chalice
contents.description: A beautiful silver chalice, tarnished with age but still valuable. It bears an inscription in an ancient language.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

visibleItems.name: brass lantern
visibleItems.description: A battery-powered brass lantern.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: trophy case
visibleItems.description: A handsome trophy case with a glass front.

contents.name: portrait
contents.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: painting
contents.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

contents.name: stack of zorkmid bills
contents.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

contents.name: platinum bar
contents.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

contents.name: Don Woods stamp
contents.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

contents.name: gold coffin
contents.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

contents.name: large emerald
contents.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

contents.name: beautiful statue
contents.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

contents.name: violin
contents.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: grail
contents.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

contents.name: crystal trident
contents.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

contents.name: leather bag of coins
contents.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

contents.name: blue crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: jade figurine
contents.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

contents.name: red crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: golden clockwork canary
contents.description: A beautiful golden clockwork canary. It sings when wound.

contents.name: brass bauble
contents.description: A shiny brass bauble, dropped by an unseen songbird in response to the canary's tune.

contents.name: silver chalice
contents.description: A beautiful silver chalice, tarnished with age but still valuable. It bears an inscription in an ancient language.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

visibleItems.name: large oriental rug
visibleItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

visibleItems.name: wooden door
visibleItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

visibleItems.name: trap door
visibleItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

attributes.name: trap door
attributes.openDescription: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
attributes.closedDescription: The dusty cover of a closed trap door.

visibleItems.name: incense
visibleItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

visibleItems.name: skeleton key
visibleItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

visibleItems.name: guidebook
visibleItems.description: This is a guidebook entitled "Flood Control Dam #3" with a picture of the dam on the cover.

visibleItems.name: matchbook
visibleItems.description: A matchbook advertising MIT Tech. The cover says "STRADDLING THE CUTTING EDGE OF NOTHING".

visibleItems.name: large brochure
visibleItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

visibleItems.name: wrench
visibleItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

visibleItems.name: trunk
visibleItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

visibleItems.name: brass bell
visibleItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

visibleItems.name: black book
visibleItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

visibleItems.name: burned-out candles
visibleItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

visibleItems.name: sharp stick
visibleItems.description: A sharp stick, which appears to have been broken at one end, is here.

visibleItems.name: blue cake
visibleItems.description: A cake with blue icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

visibleItems.name: eat-me cake
visibleItems.description: A cake with "Eat Me" written on it in icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

visibleItems.name: elongated brown sack
visibleItems.description: A brown sack smelling of hot peppers.

contents.name: lunch
contents.description: A hearty lunch.

contents.name: clove of garlic
contents.description: A clove of garlic. Its strong smell might ward off something...

visibleItems.name: brick
visibleItems.description: A square brick of calciumite with some fuse wire wrapped around it.

visibleItems.name: shiny wire
visibleItems.description: A thin piece of shiny wire, suitable as a fuse or for various mechanical uses.

visibleItems.name: frame piece
visibleItems.description: A piece of the broken frame bearing a carved inscription: "Only devotion can reveal my location."

contents.name: pot of gold
contents.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

contents.name: pearl necklace
contents.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: tin of spices
contents.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

contents.name: white crystal sphere
contents.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

contents.name: huge diamond
contents.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: sapphire bracelet
contents.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

contents.name: violin
contents.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

contents.name: grail
contents.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

contents.name: crystal trident
contents.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

contents.name: leather bag of coins
contents.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

contents.name: blue crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: jade figurine
contents.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

contents.name: red crystal sphere
contents.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

contents.name: golden clockwork canary
contents.description: A beautiful golden clockwork canary. It sings when wound.

contents.name: brass bauble
contents.description: A shiny brass bauble, dropped by an unseen songbird in response to the canary's tune.

contents.name: silver chalice
contents.description: A beautiful silver chalice, tarnished with age but still valuable. It bears an inscription in an ancient language.

contents.name: jewel-encrusted egg
contents.description: A beautiful jewel-encrusted egg. It appears to open somehow.

contents.name: gold card
contents.description: This is an ornate gold card, beautifully embossed with the royal crest of the Great Underground Empire.

allItems.description: The trap door is open, revealing a rickety staircase descending into darkness.

allItems.description: A large oriental rug in the center of the room.

allItems.description: A wooden door with strange gothic lettering. It appears to be nailed shut.

allItems.name: golden clockwork canary
allItems.description: A beautiful golden clockwork canary. It sings when wound.

allItems.name: painting
allItems.description: A painting of remarkable beauty, depicting a woodland scene. It is the only painting remaining in the gallery.

allItems.name: ivory torch
allItems.description: A beautiful torch of polished ivory, its flame burning brightly.

allItems.name: blue crystal sphere
allItems.description: A beautiful sphere of blue crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

allItems.name: wrench
allItems.description: This is a heavy wrench, suitable for loosening large bolts.

allItems.name: trunk
allItems.description: This is an old trunk, covered in mud. It appears to contain a fortune in jewels!

allItems.name: sharp stick
allItems.description: A sharp stick, which appears to have been broken at one end, is here.

allItems.name: crystal trident
allItems.description: On the shore lies Poseidon's own crystal trident.

allItems.name: jade figurine
allItems.description: A beautiful jade figurine of an oriental dragon. It is exquisitely carved.

allItems.name: sapphire bracelet
allItems.description: A delicate bracelet set with brilliant blue sapphires.

allItems.name: red crystal sphere
allItems.description: A beautiful sphere of red crystal. It seems to glow with an inner light.

allItems.name: brass bell
allItems.description: A brass bell with strange symbols engraved around its rim.

allItems.name: black book
allItems.description: An ancient book bound in black leather. Strange symbols cover the cover.

allItems.name: burned-out candles
allItems.description: A pair of burned-out candle stubs.

allItems.name: grail
allItems.description: A plain wooden grail, yet it radiates an aura of ancient holiness. Its simple appearance belies its true value.

allItems.name: platinum bar
allItems.description: This is a large bar of platinum, stamped "FROBOZZ MAGIC COMPANY".

allItems.name: gold coffin
allItems.description: The solid gold coffin used for the burial of Ramses II is here.

allItems.name: portrait
allItems.description: A magnificent oil portrait of J. Pierpont Flathead, founder of the Bank of Zork. The ornate gilded frame alone must be worth a fortune.

allItems.name: stack of zorkmid bills
allItems.description: A thick stack of crisp zorkmid bills in various denominations. The bills bear the stern likeness of Lord Dimwit Flathead.

allItems.name: pearl necklace
allItems.description: A pearl necklace with hundreds of large pearls. It must be worth a fortune.

allItems.name: eat-me cake
allItems.description: A cake with "Eat Me" written on it in icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

allItems.name: blue cake
allItems.description: A cake with blue icing. You can make out a capital E on the icing.

allItems.name: tin of spices
allItems.description: A tin of rare spices. The aroma is exotic and enticing.

allItems.name: white crystal sphere
allItems.description: A perfectly smooth sphere of white crystal. It glows with an inner light.

allItems.name: pot of gold
allItems.description: A small iron pot filled to the brim with gold coins. It is surprisingly heavy for its size.

allItems.name: large emerald
allItems.description: A large emerald of exceptional clarity and color.

allItems.name: beautiful statue
allItems.description: A beautiful statue of an ancient adventurer, carved from a single piece of white marble. The craftsmanship is exquisite.

allItems.name: leather bag of coins
allItems.description: A leather bag containing a quantity of coins of various denominations.

allItems.name: skeleton key
allItems.description: An old skeleton key, probably dropped by the unfortunate adventurer whose remains lie nearby.

allItems.name: incense
allItems.description: A stick of ancient incense, still fragrant after all these years. It was clutched in the skeleton's bony fingers.

allItems.name: silver chalice
allItems.description: A beautiful silver chalice, tarnished with age but still valuable. It bears an inscription in an ancient language.

allItems.name: violin
allItems.description: A Stradivarius! This exquisite instrument is in perfect condition despite its surroundings. It must be worth a fortune.

allItems.name: large brochure
allItems.description: A large, glossy brochure from MIT Tech. Affixed loosely to it is a small stamp.

allItems.name: Don Woods stamp
allItems.description: A small commemorative postage stamp depicting a spelunker.

allItems.name: huge diamond
allItems.description: This is an enormous diamond, perfectly cut and dazzlingly brilliant. It must be worth a fortune.

allItems.name: frame piece
allItems.description: A piece of the broken frame bearing a carved inscription: "Only devotion can reveal my location."

allItems.name: brass bauble
allItems.description: A shiny brass bauble, dropped by an unseen songbird in response to the canary's tune.

destinationRoom.description: You are on a narrow ledge overlooking the inside of an old dormant volcano. This ledge appears to be about in the middle between the floor below and the rim above. There is an exit here to the south.

room.name: Narrow Ledge
room.description: You are on a narrow ledge overlooking the inside of an old dormant volcano. This ledge appears to be about in the middle between the floor below and the rim above. There is an exit here to the south.

visibleItems.name: hook
visibleItems.description: A small hook is embedded in the rock face.

visibleItems.name: balloon
visibleItems.description: This is a large and extremely heavy wicker basket. An enormous cloth bag is draped over the side and is firmly attached to the basket. A metal receptacle is fastened to the center of the basket. Dangling from the basket is a piece of braided wire.

contents.name: receptacle
contents.description: This is a metal receptacle designed to hold burning objects. It has an opening that can be covered to control the heat.

contents.name: cloth bag
contents.description: The silk bag billows overhead, filled with hot air.

contents.name: braided wire
contents.description: A piece of braided wire dangles from the basket.
